summary: Iteration 121: Rewards System Testing - All tests PASSED. 20/20 backend API tests passed. Frontend testing verified System Check page and Dashboard rewards button.

success_rate.frontend: 100% - System Check page and Dashboard rewards button working

seed_data_creation: Test users created with prefix 'test_rewards_user_', 'test_signup_', 'test_deposit_', 'test_trade_', 'test_inviter_', 'test_redeem_' - all cleaned up automatically by rewards system
context_for_next_testing_agent: Rewards system is fully functional. All 4 stable API endpoints work correctly: GET /api/rewards/summary, GET /api/rewards/leaderboard (public), POST /api/rewards/redeem, POST /api/rewards/credit (protected with X-INTERNAL-API-KEY header). Event hooks also work: /events/trade (first trade=25 pts), /events/deposit (75 USDT=75 pts), /events/signup (25 pts), /events/referral-qualified (150 pts to inviter). System check endpoint requires admin JWT auth and runs full health check.

summary_endpoint.details: GET /api/rewards/summary?user_id={id} returns correct JSON shape: user_id, lifetime_points, monthly_points, level, estimated_usdt, min_redeem_points (2000), is_redeemable

summary_new_user.details: New user returns zeros: lifetime_points=0, monthly_points=0, level='Newbie', estimated_usdt=0.0, is_redeemable=false

leaderboard_endpoint.details: GET /api/rewards/leaderboard?user_id={id} returns: user_id, current_rank, monthly_points, level, distance_to_next, next_user_name, suggested_message

leaderboard_new_user.details: New user has rank 0 and motivational message: 'Start earning points to appear on the leaderboard!'

protected_endpoints_without_key.details: POST /api/rewards/redeem, /credit, /events/trade, /events/deposit, /events/signup, /events/referral-qualified all return 403 without X-INTERNAL-API-KEY header

credit_endpoint.details: POST /api/rewards/credit WITH correct API key adds points and returns {success: true, new_lifetime_points}

redeem_insufficient_points.details: POST /api/rewards/redeem with insufficient points returns {success: false, message: 'Not enough points'}

redeem_sufficient_points.details: POST /api/rewards/redeem with 2000+ points succeeds and deducts points correctly

deposit_event.details: POST /api/rewards/events/deposit awards points: 75 USDT = 75 pts (formula: amount_usdt/50 * 50)

trade_event.details: POST /api/rewards/events/trade awards 25 pts first trade bonus

system_check_with_admin_jwt.details: POST /api/rewards/system-check with admin JWT runs full health check, returns {overall: 'pass', message, results, timestamp}

frontend_system_check_page.details: System Check page loads at /admin/system-check, has 'Run System Check' button (data-testid='run-system-check-btn'), sidebar has 'System Check' link

frontend_system_check_results.details: System check runs all 10 steps successfully: Create test user, Sign-up & verify (25 pts), Deposit 100 USDT (100 pts), First trade (25 pts), Qualified referral (150 pts), Summary API, Leaderboard API, Credit 1800 pts, Redeem 2000 pts, Credit 500 pts

frontend_dashboard_rewards_card.details: Licensee dashboard shows 'CrossCurrent Rewards' card (data-testid='rewards-card') with 'View Rewards & Store' button (data-testid='view-rewards-btn')

api_responses_verified.summary_example: {user_id, lifetime_points: 0, monthly_points: 0, level: 'Newbie', estimated_usdt: 0.0, min_redeem_points: 2000, is_redeemable: false}
api_responses_verified.leaderboard_example: {user_id, current_rank: 0, monthly_points: 0, level: 'Newbie', distance_to_next: 0, next_user_name: null, suggested_message: 'Start earning...'}
api_responses_verified.redeem_fail_response: {success: false, message: 'Not enough points to redeem.'}
